title: Blink Charging Co. Earnings Report Dates & Earnings Forecasts
text: Blink Charging Co. (NASDAQ: BLNK) earnings forecasts and historical performance data from Nasdaq. The company reports earnings quarterly with scheduled announcement dates throughout the year. For Q1 2026, the company reported revenue of $20.78 million, missing estimates of $22.10 million. EPS of -$0.06 beat estimates of -$0.09. For Q4 2025, revenue was $27.0 million versus estimate of $29.5 million. EPS of -$0.11 beat estimate of -$0.16. Full year 2026 guidance is $105-$115 million in revenue with approximately 35% gross margins. The company has a history of missing revenue estimates while beating EPS estimates due to focus on margin improvement through recurring revenue growth and cost reduction.
